case_title: BROSE JOSETTE L VS LANDERS THOMAS F

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $998.00 FILED BY BROSE JOSETTE L AS TO DEFENDANT LANDERS THOMAS F ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROSE JOSETTE L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANDERS THOMAS F $604.86 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $604.86 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
